mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (user_id, type, title, content, reservation_id, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{reservationId}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notice WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM notice WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
